sql_array: CREATE TABLE encrypted_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content BLOB);
INSERT INTO encrypted_data (id, content) VALUES (1, encrypt('Sensitive Data 1', 'kaes'));
UPDATE encrypted_data SET content = encrypt('Updated Sensitive Data', 'kaes') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, content FROM encrypted_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, decrypt(content, 'kaes') AS decrypted_content FROM encrypted_data WHERE id = 1;
